input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.3.1
            TITLE: all wires and terminals and other conductors used in the tractive system must be sized for the

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.3.1: All wires and terminals and other conductors used in the Tractive System must be sized for the
EV.6.3.1 All wires and terminals and other conductors used in the Tractive System must be sized for the 
continuous current they will conduct

final_answer: All wires and terminals and other conductors used in the Tractive System must be sized for the continuous current they will conduct
